name: mail-mcp
description: MCP server and VS Code extension for AI-powered email management with human-in-the-loop approval.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/mcp-server && npm run build -w packages/webview && npm run compile -w packages/extension
scripts.build:production: npm run build -w packages/mcp-server && npm run build -w packages/webview && npm run package -w packages/extension
